title: The Captain Is a Lady
writer: Henry Clark, Rachel Crothers, Louise Forsslund
actors: Charles Coburn, Beulah Bondi, Virginia Grey
plot: Because of a bad investment, Captain and Mrs. Peabody are evicted from their home. Mrs. Peabody finds lodging at a retirement home, but as only single women are allowed, the Captain has to make other arrangements. However, after w...
